title: GEEPAS 2-in-1 Food Jug Blender | 1.8L Juice Jar & 60G Mini Coffee Spice Mill | 6-Leaf Stainless-Steel Blades 2 Speed & Pulse Lockable Lid | Smoothie Maker Turbo Button for Ice Crushing | 600W White
features: ✅ NOTE – SAFETY LOCK FEATURE – This blender operates only when the jar is securely closed and locked onto the motor, ensuring safe use and preventing accidental starts. A must-have for families with kids.
✅ BLEND LIKE A PRO-This 600W smoothie blender delivers powerful blending for everything from ice to sauces. Enjoy ultra-smooth textures in seconds—perfect for shakes, soups, and everyday blends.
✅ YOUR TEXTURE, YOUR WAY-With 2 speeds and a pulse function, this blender for kitchen puts you in charge. Whether you like it chunky or smooth, you get the texture you want—every time, your way.

✅ TURBO WHEN YOU NEED IT-Got thick shakes or frozen fruits? Hit turbo for a quick power boost. This food blender powers through tough ingredients in seconds—perfect for busy mornings and bold recipes.

✅ JUG BLENDER FOR EVERY TASK – Big batch or small grind? The 1.8L jug blender takes on fruits and veggies with ease, while the mini jar handles nuts, spices, and coffee beans. Whatever you’re making, it’s got you covered.

✅ STEEL BLADES THAT STAY SHARP- The 6-leaf blades in this juicer blender slice through ice, nuts, and frozen fruits with ease. They stay sharp, resist rust, and clean up quickly—just rinse or pop in the dishwasher!

✅ STABILITY THAT MAKES SENSE – The ice blender stays firmly in place thanks to non-slip feet—no sliding, no spills. It blends steadily on any countertop surface. Great for busy kitchens and safe use around kids.

✅ BUILT TO LAST, BUILT TO PROTECT-The soup blender has overheat protection that stops it if it gets too hot—no stress, no damage. It keeps the motor safe and helps your blender last longer. Use it every day with confidence.

✅ COFFEE GRINDER INCLUDED-This fruit blender comes with a jar that grinds coffee, nuts, and seeds with ease. Enjoy fresh flavours every morning without extra gadgets. One smart set for blending and grinding it all.
description: Product Description EASY TO USE & CONTROL Choose from low-speed, high-speed or the pulse function. VERSATILE 2-IN 1-OPERATION Includes blender jug & grinder cup for fast food preparation. STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Durable blades make light work of chopping ingredients. 1.8 LITRE CAPACITY The 1.8 litre jar offers ample capacity for your blending needs.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Multiple Speeds, Overheat Protection, Portable, Pulse Technology
